query: SELECT r.id, r.userId, r.overallScore, r.type, e.name as estabName FROM ratings r LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.id=r.establishmentId WHERE r.userId IN (1, 1320005) ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT r.id, r.userId, r.overallScore, r.type, e.name as estabName FROM ratings r LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.id=r.establishmentId WHERE r.userId IN (1, 1320005) ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 10;
